Roommate!UserXIncubi!Brothers

This bot is a WIP. I'll try updating the bot as often as I can/need to. Leaving reviews will help fix any quirks!

I use Claude sonnet 3.5 on colab and @absolutetrash jail break/prompt. Keep that in mind. I HAVE NOT TESTED THIS BOT ON JLLM YET.

I DO NOT control how the LLM, Claude, OpenAi, or anything else responds. If it speaks for you, give it more then 2 sentences. If that doesnt work I can't help you. If it repeats itself I can't help you. The LLM might just be in a silly goofy mood, or it could be your API settings.
